gold.title: Morphing Dialog
gold.reason: Framer Motion layout animation dialog with click-outside and Escape key support — production-ready, polished modal that works as a video lightbox or feature showcase on any SaaS site.

gold.title: Video Player Pro
gold.reason: Full-featured video player with shadcn controls, play/pause, volume popover with slider, seek, fullscreen, and settings — production-ready embeddable video player for product demo sections.

gold.title: Dynamic Frame Layout
gold.reason: Framer Motion multi-frame video layout with hover state, corner/edge decorators, and configurable grid — visually distinctive video showcase section for portfolio and product landing pages.

gold.title: Hover Play Card
gold.reason: Video card that plays on hover — polished, modern interaction pattern widely used on SaaS product pages to preview video content without modal friction.

silver.title: Video Player
silver.reason: Framer Motion-styled video player with Tailwind — clean and functional; good alternative to the Pro variant for simpler use cases.

silver.title: Video Thumbnail Player
silver.reason: Thumbnail-based video player — good pattern for product demo sections; click-to-play from poster image.

silver.title: Thumbnail Button Video Player
silver.reason: Thumbnail button triggering video playback — practical, clean interaction for embedding product videos on landing pages.

silver.title: Information Card
silver.reason: Callout/announcement card usable as banner, toast, or info block — versatile, well-described component for delivering updates; broadly applicable across site sections.

silver.title: Video Generator Card
silver.reason: AI video generator UI card — polished for AI/SaaS products; niche but growing market segment.

silver.title: Onboarding Checklist
silver.reason: Onboarding step checklist — useful SaaS in-app UI component; slightly off-category but well-built.

bronze.title: Video Timeline Editor
bronze.reason: Video timeline editor UI — highly specific app-level component; only applicable to video editing SaaS, not general website redesign.

bronze.title: Video Upload Card
bronze.reason: Video upload interface card — app-specific upload UI; not a website section component for standard redesigns.

bronze.title: Neon Maze
bronze.reason: Neon maze visual — decorative only, described as for games/UI art; too niche and non-functional for general website sections.

bronze.title: Timestamp
bronze.reason: Badge-style timestamp atom — extremely simple single-purpose element; not a website section or meaningful standalone component.

bronze.title: Welcome
bronze.reason: Welcome screen component — very app-specific onboarding UI; limited applicability for standard website redesign contexts.
